post.description: Creates a new shipping address that will be used for order fulfillment. This endpoint validates the address with GHN (Giao Hàng Nhanh) shipping service to ensure deliverability. The address is saved to the database and cross-validated against the GHN shipping system to ensure it can be delivered.

requestBody.description: Address creation data with location details (street, ward, district, province) and optional user association

201.description: Address created successfully and validated with shipping provider. Returns both the database address record and the validated GHN province, district, and ward information with their IDs.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request body, missing required fields, or the address could not be validated in the GHN system. Check that all required fields (street, ward, district, province, zipCode, country) are provided and valid.

404.description: Not Found - The provided province, district, or ward was not found in the GHN shipping system database. Verify that spelling matches Vietnamese location names in the GHN system.

500.description: Internal Server Error - Failed to create address in database or communicate with GHN service

post.description: Builds package data from order items and validated address data, applies item-level vouchers (priority: variant > product > category), selects the best user voucher for package-level discount, calculates GHN shipping service/fee/ETA, and returns a package payload plus checksum information for later order creation validation.

requestBody.description: Input for checkout preview. orderItems contains productVariantId and quantity per item. createNewAddressForOrderResponseDto must be the validated response from createNewAddressForOrder and is used to determine destination district/ward for GHN fee and ETA calculation.

200.description: Preview calculated successfully. Returns a map keyed by ghnShopId. Each value contains checksumInformation (checksumIdInDB, checksumData) and PackageDetail (items, applied vouchers, subtotal, package-level discount, total price, GHN service, shipping fee, origin/destination codes, and expected delivery time).

schema.description: Map keyed by GHN shop ID for checkout preview package payload used by create-order

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid preview input or business validation failed, such as empty order items, invalid address payload, missing userId in address payload, out-of-stock variant, or GHN fee/ETA calculation failure.

404.description: Not Found - User not found, product variant not found, shop origin location cannot be resolved in GHN, or no GHN shipping service is available for the selected origin/destination route.

post.description: Creates a return request for a delivered order that belongs to the authenticated user. The request is stored in the database only and does not call VNPay refund APIs.

requestBody.description: Return request payload containing orderId, userId, description, and bank account information

400.description: Bad Request - duplicate return request, incomplete bank information, or invalid return request data

404.description: Not Found - order does not exist, does not belong to the user, or is not eligible for return

post.summary: Create a new return request (user or admin only)

patch.description: Updates return request status following a mandatory two-step workflow: PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → APPROVED/REJECTED. When current status is PENDING, must transition to IN_PROGRESS first (review step). When current status is IN_PROGRESS, must transition to APPROVED or REJECTED (final decision). Cannot update to the same status or revert to PENDING. Requires staff role (ADMIN or OPERATOR). DB-only operation; does not call external refund APIs.

requestBody.description: Status update payload with processByStaffId (staff member ID) and status (target: APPROVED, REJECTED, or IN_PROGRESS). PENDING requests must set status=IN_PROGRESS. IN_PROGRESS requests must set status=APPROVED or REJECTED.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid status transition (e.g., PENDING→APPROVED, IN_PROGRESS→IN_PROGRESS), invalid target status, request is not a return request type, or current status is not PENDING/IN_PROGRESS

404.description: Not Found - return request not found by ID

patch.description: Allows a user to update their own PENDING return request details. Users can modify bank account information and description ONLY if the request status is PENDING. Once staff marks the request as IN_PROGRESS or makes a final decision (APPROVED/REJECTED), no further user edits are allowed. Bank information must be provided completely (all three fields: bankName, bankAccountNumber, bankAccountName) or not at all (all-or-nothing). Partial bank updates are not permitted.

requestBody.description: Update payload with optional bank info (all-or-nothing) and description. bankName, bankAccountNumber, bankAccountName must all be provided together or all omitted. Request must be in PENDING status to update.

400.description: Bad Request - Request status is not PENDING, partial bank information provided, request does not belong to user, or invalid request type

404.description: Not Found - return request not found or associated order not found

googleId.example: press google id from front end

media.description: Media files associated with the product (avatar/images)

productVariants.description: Product variants (size/color combinations) with their media files

estimatedDelivery.description: at shop, estimate time when leave from shop

deliveredAt.description: at shop, actual time when leave from shop

estimatedShipDate.description: at customer, estimate time when arrive to customer

shippedAt.description: at customer, actual time when arrive to customer

description.example: The product arrived damaged and I would like to return it.

message.example: Send email from ecommerce shop successfully!

userId.description: User ID if address belongs to a user

isOrderAddress.description: Indicates whether this address is specifically created for an order (true) or is a general user address (false). This field is used to differentiate between addresses that are meant for order fulfillment and those that are general user addresses. Order addresses may have different handling in the system, such as being excluded from user address lists and being associated directly with orders.

CanUpdateCOD.description: Whether COD can be updated for this district
Whether COD can be updated for this ward

toProvince.description: Validated destination province information from GHN shipping system. Contains GHN province ID and metadata needed for GHN API calls

toDistrict.description: Validated destination district information from GHN shipping system. Contains pickup/delivery types, COD support, and other shipping-related capabilities

toWard.description: Validated destination ward information from GHN shipping system. Contains support type for final delivery location and delivery constraints

orderAddressInDb.description: The newly created address record from the database with ID and all address components (street, ward, district, province, country, zipCode)

orderAddressInGHN.description: GHN (Giao Hàng Nhanh) validated address components for order delivery location. Contains province, district, and ward details with their GHN system IDs required for shipping fee calculation and shipment creation

description.example: This is profile of John. He like wide t shirt and long trouser
This is profile of John. He like wide t shirt and long trouser
This is a description of the order

shippingAddress.description: Validated shipping address for order creation (database address plus GHN location data).

packages.description: Packages grouped by GHN shop ID. Each key is a shop ID string and each value is a PackageDetail object.

ghnPickShiftId.description: please pass id that is a result of pickShiftOnGHNSystem api

ghnTitle.description: please pass title that is a result of pickShiftOnGHNSystem api

ghnFromTime.description: please pass from_time that is a result of pickShiftOnGHNSystem api

ghnToTime.description: please pass to_time that is a result of pickShiftOnGHNSystem api

estimatedDelivery.description: at shop, estimate time when leave from shop

deliveredAt.description: at shop, actual time when leave from shop

estimatedShipDate.description: at customer, estimate time when arrive to customer

shippedAt.description: at customer, actual time when arrive to customer

vnp_Amount.description: Payment amount (library will convert to VNPay unit: amount * 100)

vnp_TxnRef.description: Merchant transaction reference (must be unique per day)

vnp_Amount.description: Payment amount - Numeric string, VNPAY returns amount multiplied by 100

vnp_BankCode.description: Bank code used for payment - 3-20 alphanumeric characters. Example: NCB

vnp_OrderInfo.description: Payment description from original transaction - Vietnamese without accents

vnp_TransactionNo.description: Transaction code recorded in VNPAY system - 1-15 numeric characters

vnp_TransactionStatus.description: Transaction status at VNPAY (00 = successful, others = failed)

vnp_TxnRef.description: Merchant transaction reference from original request - 1-100 alphanumeric characters

vnp_SecureHash.description: Secure hash from VNPAY callback - 32-256 alphanumeric characters for checksum verification

vnp_BankTranNo.description: Transaction code at bank - 1-255 alphanumeric characters

vnp_CardType.description: Type of account/card used: ATM, QRCODE

vnp_PayDate.description: Payment date - Format: yyyyMMddHHmmss (14 numeric characters)

withHash.description: Whether the secure hash is included in data

logger.description: Logger options (can be {type: "all"}, {type: "omit", fields: [...]}, or {type: "pick", fields: [...]})

data.description: Return query data from VNPAY callback

vnp_Amount.description: Payment amount (converted back from multiplied by 100)

vnp_TransactionNo.description: Transaction code recorded in VNPAY system

vnp_TxnRef.description: Merchant transaction reference from original request

isVerified.description: Whether the secure hash is verified (true = valid signature)

isSuccess.description: Whether the payment is successful (true = payment processed)

vnp_CardType.description: Type of account/card used: ATM, QRCODE

vnp_RequestId.description: Request ID for the query (unique per request)

vnp_CreateBy.description: Name of the person creating the query

withHash.description: Whether the secure hash is included in data

logger.description: Logger options (can be {type: "all"}, {type: "omit", fields: [...]}, or {type: "pick", fields: [...]})

data.description: Query dispute record data for VNPAY

vnp_RequestId.description: Request ID for the refund (unique per request)

vnp_TxnRef.description: Original transaction reference ID to refund

vnp_Amount.description: Amount to refund (in VND, will be divided by 100)

vnp_IpAddr.description: IP address of the refund request

vnp_TransactionNo.description: Original VNPay transaction number (recommended for refund)

vnp_TransactionType.description: Refund type: 02 = full refund, 03 = partial refund

vnp_CreateBy.description: Name of the person creating the refund request

withHash.description: Whether the secure hash is included in data

logger.description: Logger options (can be {type: "all"}, {type: "omit", fields: [...]}, or {type: "pick", fields: [...]})

title.example: Order Update: Your order #1234 has been shipped!

content.example: Dear customer, your order #1234 has been shipped and is expected to arrive within 3-5 business days. Thank you for shopping with us!

recipientId.description: ID of the user who will receive this personal notification

title.example: New Sale Alert: 20% off on all electronics!

content.example: You can save 20% on all electronics from Aug 1 to Aug 7. Don't miss out on this limited-time offer!

packageItems.description: Product variants in this package with pricing and discount information (ID, name, size, color, SKU, quantity, unitPrice, discountType, discountValue, totalPrice)

packageItemsForGHNCreateNewOrderRequest.description: Package items formatted for GHN create order API request (name, code, quantity, price, length, width, height, weight, category)

totalWeight.description: Total weight of all items in this package in grams

totalHeight.description: Total height of stacked items in centimeters

maxLength.description: Maximum length among all items in centimeters

maxWidth.description: Maximum width among all items in centimeters

ghnProvinceName.description: Province name for pickup location from GHN API

ghnDistrictName.description: District name for pickup location from GHN API

ghnWardName.description: Ward name for pickup location from GHN API

shippingService.description: Selected GHN shipping service details (service_id, short_name like "Express/Standard/Saving", service_type_id, config_fee_id, extra_cost_id, standard_config_fee_id, standard_extra_cost_id)

shippingFee.description: Calculated shipping fee for this package in VND

expectedDeliveryTime.description: Expected delivery time with leadtime (Unix timestamp for delivery) and order_date (Unix timestamp for order creation)

from_district_id.description: GHN district ID for pickup location

from_ward_code.description: GHN ward code for pickup location

to_district_id.description: GHN district ID for delivery location

to_ward_code.description: GHN ward code for delivery location

estimatedDelivery.description: at shop, estimate time when leave from shop

deliveredAt.description: at shop, actual time when leave from shop

estimatedShipDate.description: at customer, estimate time when arrive to customer

shippedAt.description: at customer, actual time when arrive to customer

orderItems.description: Order items for checkout preview. Each item requires productVariantId and quantity.

createNewAddressForOrderResponseDto.description: Validated address payload returned by create-address-for-order endpoint. orderAddressInGHN and orderAddressInDb are required and are used to compute GHN service, shipping fee, and expected delivery time.

appliedVoucher.description: Applied voucher snapshot at item level. Null means no voucher applied for this item.

userVoucher.description: Selected user voucher snapshot for package-level discount. Null means no user voucher applied.

to_user_id.description: User ID associated with destination address. Runtime type can be bigint and may be serialized as string/number in JSON.

checksumIdInDB.description: Checksum record ID stored in database. Runtime type is bigint and may be serialized as string in JSON.

checksumData.description: Checksum data used to validate package integrity before create-order.

estimatedDelivery.description: at shop, estimate time when leave from shop

deliveredAt.description: at shop, actual time when leave from shop

estimatedShipDate.description: at customer, estimate time when arrive to customer

shippedAt.description: at customer, actual time when arrive to customer

description.example: The product arrived damaged and I would like to return it.

bankName.example: AGRIBANK | BIDV | VIETCOMBANK | VIETINBANK | MBBANK | ACB | TECHCOMBANK | VPBANK | TPBANK | SACOMBANK | HDBANK | VIB | OCB | SHB | SEABANK | EXIMBANK | MSB | NAMABANK | BACABANK | PVCOMBANK | ABBANK | LIENVIETPOSTBANK | KIENLONGBANK | VIETABANK | SAIGONBANK

AGRIBANK | BIDV | VIETCOMBANK | VIETINBANK | MBBANK | ACB | TECHCOMBANK | VPBANK | TPBANK | SACOMBANK | HDBANK | VIB | OCB | SHB | SEABANK | EXIMBANK | MSB | NAMABANK | BACABANK | PVCOMBANK | ABBANK | LIENVIETPOSTBANK | KIENLONGBANK | VIETABANK | SAIGONBANK

name.description: Unique room name used to create or identify the chat room

description.description: Optional room description shown to users in room list/details
description.example: Public room for discussing order updates

isPrivate.description: Optional flag to indicate room visibility. True: private room, False: public room

name.description: Target room name that the current user wants to join

text.description: Message content to send to a public room
text.example: Hello everyone, this is a public message

room_name.description: Target public room name where the message will be broadcast

text.description: Private message content sent to a single receiver
text.example: Hi, can we discuss the order details?

receiver.description: Receiver user ID (as string) for private message delivery
